creator: United States Signal Corp
description: A very large number of scans from Signal Corp photos related to almost every theater of battle during WWII as well as the home front and other related photos. Most pictures have the Signal Corp captions included with them which mention names, dates, places, etc. An Excel sheet with photo descriptions is also included.
